treatments.rationale: Preserve help intent and catalog semantics.
Replace resolver, artifact reads, and remote documentation with typed host inputs or explicit unavailable facts.
Preserve core configuration field definitions as source evidence.
Exclude source installation behavior.
Preserve the exact 13-column catalog rows.
Do not fetch _meta URLs.
Preserve module configuration and the six-record roster as separate source data.
Preserve catalog/help semantics and the bmad-architecture action identity.

Replace activation, resolver, config, dispatch, and persistent-fact machinery with a sealed host-bounded persona projection (rewritten semantics; no source body distribution).

Translate architecture-create intent into the later capability-specific host state machine.
Preserve safe architecture defaults.
Represent external sources and handoffs, hooks, skills, and file globs as typed unavailable facts.
Grant no effect or execution to those directives.
Translate artifact-shape semantics into an independently authored closed app-local design.
Do not copy the source template bytes into runtime.
Translate deterministic-check and model-review intent into typed host review ports.
Do not run source scripts or subagents.
Retain outcome and status semantics as non-runnable reference evidence.

The desktop delivery has no headless mode: script invocation, web verification, subagent reviewer lenses, and artifact-path outputs are categorically excluded; the assumptions/open-questions discipline is already carried by the architecture projection.
Preserve the deprecated alias as a closed compatibility-shim identity.
Never dispatch arbitrary forwarded text.
Retain only the four legacy fields through the typed resolver.
Treat executable source content as evidence only; never bundle, run, or line-port it.
